title: True / False / Not Given
instructions: Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.

questions.statement: The Trump administration ordered Anthropic to block access only for users outside the United States.
The article states that the legal basis for the government's order has already been confirmed by the courts.
The United States has never previously restricted access to important technologies.
According to the article, open-weight AI models may become widely available.
Anthropic earns most of its consumer revenue from American users.
The article suggests that different countries may receive AI models with different capabilities.
Europe currently possesses more computing power than the United States.
The author argues that Europe should ban American AI companies.
The article says that SpaceX has already built operational data centres in space.
The article explains exactly how much money European governments should invest in AI infrastructure.
